_meta.title: PDP NV 361/2014 — Decision Tree Supplement (N4C.7)
open_questions: Q-20260524-001: ICs assembled into PCBs — pre-installation condition scope
Q-20260524-002: Precious metals — Příloha 5 scrap vs. Příloha 6 raw metals boundary; re-smelting reclassification
Q-20260524-003: Heat and cold (teplo/chlad) — Příloha č. 6 item 4 scope vs. § 7a(2) definition
Q-20260524-004: Account 349 vs. direct 343 — canonical Czech accounting practice for PDP buyer self-assessment

global_pdp_conditions.description: All domestic PDP requires both supplier AND buyer to be Czech plátce DPH (§ 92a ZDPH)

NV361-ENTRY.description: Entry point: supply between two Czech plátci. Classify against NV 361/2014 categories.

checks.question: Is the supply a transfer of greenhouse gas emission allowances (EU ETS)?
Is the supply of gas or electricity AND is the buyer a § 7a(2) designated trader (primarily buys for resale, own consumption negligible)?
Is the supply of gas/electricity origin guarantee certificates?
Is the supply a wholesale telecom/electronic communications service (operator-to-operator)?

NV361-CN-LOOKUP.description: Check if goods CN code is in the NV 361/2014 § 2 odst. 3 list

checks.question: Does the supply's CN code match any of: 8517 12 00, 8517 18 00, 8471 30 00, 9504, 8542 31, 1005, 1201, 1205, 1206 00, 1207 50, 1207 91, 1209 10 00, 1212 91, or Chapter 71/Class XV metals (with exclusions)?
Is the total základ daně of ALL qualifying selected goods on this single supply > 100,000 CZK?

NV361-EMISNI-POVOLENKY.note: No threshold. Every transfer between Czech plátci triggers PDP.

NV361-PLYN-ELEKTRINA.note: Buyer must qualify as § 7a(2) trader. Non-traders: normal DPH.

NV361-CERTIFIKATY.note: Gas and electricity origin guarantee certificates. No threshold.

NV361-TELEKOM.note: Wholesale telecom services only. Retail telecom to consumers: normal DPH.

RESULT-PDP-ZBOZI.note: Supplier invoices základ daně only. Buyer self-assesses at stated rate.

RESULT-NORMAL-DPH.note: Supplier charges DPH at applicable rate.

1001.note: Wheat NOT in NV 361/2014 — normal DPH

1002.note: Rye NOT in NV 361/2014 — normal DPH

1003.note: Barley NOT in NV 361/2014 — normal DPH

1004.note: Oats NOT in NV 361/2014 — normal DPH

metals_note.cn_scope: Chapter 71 (precious metals, raw) + Class XV (CN 72-83) raw/semi-processed forms, with exclusions
exclusions: Goods covered by Příloha č. 5 (scrap/waste) — those use § 92c + Příloha č. 5 (no threshold)
Finished metal articles (tools, fittings, castings) — normal DPH
Investment gold under § 92 exempt regime — separate § 92b rule
